snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:
Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into JustinвАЩs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

JUSTICE the album out now: https://JustinBieber.lnk.to/Justice

snippet.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso
snippet.description:
Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso рЯТНрЯСЂ
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios as√≠ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, est√°bamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empez√≥ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porqu√©, ni la ten√≠amos muy clara de lo que est√°bamos buscando. Sab√≠amos que lo que yo quer√≠a era una canci√≥n de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este √°lbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. вАЬDios as√≠ lo quisoвАЭ es una canci√≥n de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√Їo  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

¬њPorqu√© Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la m√Їsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, √©l ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: ¬њpara cu√°ndo una canci√≥n con Juan Luis? Yo lo recib√≠a como un ¬њqui√©n sabe?, ¬њcu√°ndo podr√° ser? o lo recib√≠a como: ¬°alg√Їn d√≠a tendr√© una canci√≥n apropiada para hacer con √©l! Pero cuando le mont√© la voz a esta canci√≥n me tom√© el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostr√© el tema y le dije que so√±aba con poder  hacerla con √©l. Juan Luis no me dej√≥ terminar, literalmente, no me dej√≥ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canci√≥n y por supuesto me dijo que s√≠. De ah√≠ en adelante todo transcurri√≥ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis mont√≥ voces, me la envi√≥ e hicimos esta edici√≥n de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es m√°s que obvio. Es una hermos√≠sima canci√≥n de amor que espero toque el coraz√≥n a todo el mundo.
вАФ

Como Decirte Mujer

A la que esta contigo yo se que le gusto

Ready for life baby, forever (jajaja)
Gangster shit 
Aja
El producto mas caro no paro de josearlo 
Metiendo los palos, las balas son

Ando con mi banda acemando el terror

Le damos piso si comete un error

Los bandidos en la calle saben lo que hay

Los cascabel en el cuello, to los poderes 
Ahora me encuentro hasta bello, hoy voy a partirte ese sello 
Suenan los gritos cuando en mi cama la estrello ¬њ?
Ayer detonamos en canto la tienda de la burberry

To mis soldados caminan derechos y con la cartera real g en el pecho
La herramienta la asecho, porque vamos a tumbar to lo que esta mal hecho
Tu mamas con el swagger, tu sabeвАЩ que tenemos el respeto y el power

No salgan traвАЩ de mi hijo puta porque se van a morir 
La nueva sangre, dando fuego al que brinque los alambres 
Cabron aqu√≠ to el mundo tiene hambre

Con Dios por delante marcaremos algo hist√≥rico 
Desde la cima, pronto se les va a cambiar el clima 
En la industria musical repartiendo la disciplina

No le niego la guerra a ning√Їn cabron, siempre van a decir: el negro la acabo

snippet.description:
De peque√±o siempre quise una minimoto y no podia tenerla :D


Aunque solo es una 125cc como pesa tan poco corre un monton, y es super agil, creo que podria ser de lo mas divertido que tengo.

* Mi casco es el tipico de 30вВђ y lo mejor seria uno integral, pero aun no he encontrado uno que tenga la misma visibilidad que uno abierto y pese poco (escucho ideas)

snippet.title: Apex Legends War Games Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Shall we play a game? The new War Games Event features five rotating takeover modes with never-before-seen modifiers, a new rewards track, and new skins.  

Maggie warned the Legends what would happen if they didnвАЩt deliver Fuse to her. Now sheвАЩs following through on her threat. Say goodbye to your precious games -- SalvoвАЩs War Games are here instead. Play five rotating limited-time takeovers over two weeks. Shields regenerate in Shield Regen, round time is reduced whenever a Legend dies in Killing Time, automatically retrieve fallen banners in Auto Banners, compete for top loot in Ultra Zones, and get a free respawn in Second Chance. Plus check out the store to get bold new cosmetics. Everybody loves a little Mayhem -- get out there and make Maggie proud. 

Apex LegendsвДҐ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Ѓ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.  

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 вАУ Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

ўДўВЎѓ Ў≠Ў∞Ў±Ў™ ўЕЎІЎђўК ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥ЎІЎЈўКЎ± ўЕўЕЎІ Ў≥ўКЎ≠ЎѓЎЂ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ ўДўЕ ўКЎ≥ўДўЕўИЎІ ""ўБўКўИЎ≤"" Ў•ўДўКўЗЎІ. ўИЎІўДЎҐўЖ ўЗўК Ў™ўЖўБЎ∞ Ў™ўЗЎѓўКЎѓўЗЎІ. ўИЎѓўСЎє Ў£ўДЎєЎІЎ®ўГ ЎІўДЎЇЎІўДўКЎ© -- ўДўВЎѓ Ў≠ўДЎ™ ўЕЎ≠ўДўЗЎІ War Games ўБўК Ў≥ЎІўДўБўИ. ЎІўДЎєЎ® ЎЃўЕЎ≥Ў© Ў£ўЖўЕЎІЎЈ Ў®ЎѓўКўДЎ© ўЕЎ™ЎЇўКЎ±Ў© ўЕЎ≠ЎѓўИЎѓЎ© ЎІўДўИўВЎ™ ЎєўДўЙ ўЕЎѓЎІЎ± Ў£Ў≥Ў®ўИЎєўКўЖ. Ў™Ў™ўЕ Ў•ЎєЎІЎѓЎ© Ў•ўЖЎіЎІЎ° ЎІўДЎѓЎ±ўИЎє ўБўК Shield RegenЎМ ўИўКўЖЎЃўБЎґ ўИўВЎ™ ЎІўДЎђўИўДЎ© ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ Ў™ўЕўИЎ™ Ў£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±Ў© ўБўК Killing TimeЎМ ўИўКЎ™ўЕ ЎІЎ≥Ў™Ў±ЎѓЎІЎѓ ЎІўДЎіЎєЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў≥ўВЎЈЎ™ Ў™ўДўВЎІЎ¶ўКўЛЎІ ўБўК Auto BannersЎМ ўИЎ™ўЖЎІўБЎ≥ ўДўДЎ≠ЎµўИўД ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ўБЎґўД ЎІўДЎЇўЖЎІЎ¶ўЕ ўБўК Ultra ZonesЎМ ўИЎІЎ≠ЎµўД ЎєўДўЙ Ў•ЎєЎІЎѓЎ© ЎІўЖЎ™ЎіЎІЎ± Ў®ЎµўИЎ±Ў© Ў≠Ў±Ў© ўБўК Second Chance. Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ Ў∞ўДўГЎМ Ў£ўДўВ ўЖЎЄЎ±Ў© ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДўЕЎ™ЎђЎ± ўДўДЎ≠ЎµўИўД ЎєўДўЙ ЎєўЖЎІЎµЎ± ЎЄЎІўЗЎ±ўКЎ© ЎђЎѓўКЎѓЎ© ЎђЎ±ўКЎ¶Ў©. ЎІўДЎђўЕўКЎє ўКЎ≠Ў®ўИўЖ ЎІўДўВўДўКўД ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўБўИЎґўЙ -- ЎІўЖЎЈўДўВ ўИЎІЎђЎєўД ўЕЎІЎђўК Ў™ўБЎЃЎ± Ў®ўГ. 

Apex LegendsвДҐвАО ўЗўК ўДЎєЎ®Ў© ўЕЎєЎІЎ±ўГ ўЕЎђЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў≠ўКЎЂ Ў™Ў™ўВЎІЎ™ўД ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±ўКЎ© Ў®Ў≠ЎЂўЛЎІ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎѓ ўИЎІўДЎіўЗЎ±Ў© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўИЎ© ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ЎЈЎ±ЎІўБ Frontier. nl-NL.title: Apex Legends War Games Event-trailer
nl-NL.description:
Zullen we een spelletje spelen? Het nieuwe War Games Event bevat vijf roulerende takeover modes met nog nooit eerder geziene modifiers, een nieuw beloningenpad en nieuwe skins.  

Maggie waarschuwde de Legends voor wat er zou gebeuren als ze Fuse niet bij haar afleverden. Nu komt ze haar belofte na. Zeg maar dag tegen je kostbare games: je krijgt nu te maken met Salvo's War Games. Speel twee weken lang vijf roulerende tijdelijke takeovers. Schilden herstellen in Shield Regen, de rondetijd wordt verkort als een Legend doodgaat in Killing Time, haal automatisch gevallen banieren op in Auto Banners, speel voor de beste loot in Ultra Zones en krijg een gratis respawn in Second Chance. En ga naar de store om vette nieuwe cosmetische items te krijgen. Iedereen houdt wel van een beetje chaos: stort je in de strijd en maak Maggie trots. 

Apex LegendsвДҐ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStation¬Ѓ4, PlayStation¬Ѓ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch en pc via Origin en Steam.  

Meer informatie over Apex Legends Season 8 вАУ Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Bekijk ons YouTube-kanaal: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Volg ons op Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Volg ons op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

en.title: Apex Legends War Games Event Trailer
en.description:
Shall we play a game? The new War Games Event features five rotating takeover modes with never-before-seen modifiers, a new rewards track, and new skins.  

Maggie warned the Legends what would happen if they didnвАЩt deliver Fuse to her. Now sheвАЩs following through on her threat. Say goodbye to your precious games -- SalvoвАЩs War Games are here instead. Play five rotating limited-time takeovers over two weeks. Shields regenerate in Shield Regen, round time is reduced whenever a Legend dies in Killing Time, automatically retrieve fallen banners in Auto Banners, compete for top loot in Ultra Zones, and get a free respawn in Second Chance. Plus check out the store to get bold new cosmetics. Everybody loves a little Mayhem -- get out there and make Maggie proud.

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вАФ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвАЩve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that youвАЩre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвАЩve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnвАЩt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youвАЩre all the same
Because I hear heвАЩs got his arm вАШround a brand new girl
IвАЩve been picking up my heart
HeвАЩs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвАЩs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвАЩs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвАЩs really such a shame
ItвАЩs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвАЩm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвАЩll miss me
But by then youвАЩll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвАЩve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвАЩre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.description:

                         (X 2 ) 

Polic√≠a no me mate por favor , no e echo nada soy inocente acribillar un indefenso no es un acto de valiente menos un orgullo para Duarte tampoco para e presidente tengo amigos en esa instituci√≥n de familia decente .

No se qu√© pas√≥ ese d√≠a , no soy quien para cuestionar pero ya hay una falta y solo queda lamentar solo nos queda recordar esa familia que murio , los mismo poli est√°n quillaoвАЩ y est√°n dolido igual que yo .

Solo Dios puede decir que hacer con nuestras vidas para mi eso fue un error esa es mi √Їnica perspectiva .

NamaвАЩ eвАЩ eso en la noticia una se√±ora sale explicando ahog√°ndose no se entend√≠a porque estaba llorado el presidente indignado se le ve√≠a el rojo en los ojos ,destacaba que la vida va por encima de todo habl√≥ lleno de rabia con el dolor en el alma dijo que es obligatorio qu√© hay que hacer una reforma.
Jur√≥ que se har√° justicia tambi√©n nos pidi√≥ que oremos por el dolor de esa familia que a su familiar perdieron .

snippet.title: Space Jam: Una Nueva Era - Trailer 1
snippet.description:
¬°Bienvenidos al partido del siglo! El campe√≥n de la NBA e √≠cono mundial LeBron James se embarca en una aventura √©pica junto a Bugs Bunny con el evento animado / de acci√≥n en vivo "Space Jam: Una Nueva EraвАЭ, del director Malcolm D. Lee y un equipo de cine innovador que incluye a Ryan Coogler y Maverick Carter. Este viaje de transformaci√≥n es una combinaci√≥n man√≠aca de dos mundos que revela hasta d√≥nde llegar√°n algunos padres para conectarse con sus hijos. Cuando LeBron y su peque√±o hijo Dom quedan atrapados en un espacio digital por una IA deshonesta, LeBron debe llevarlos a casa a salvo liderando a Bugs, Lola Bunny y toda la pandilla de Looney Tunes notoriamente indisciplinados a la victoria sobre los campeones digitalizados de la IA en el cancha: una lista mejorada de estrellas profesionales del baloncesto como nunca antes las hab√≠as visto. Son Tunes versus Goons en el desaf√≠o m√°s importante de su vida, que redefinir√° el v√≠nculo de LeBron con su hijo y arrojar√° luz sobre el poder de ser uno mismo. Las melod√≠as listas para la acci√≥n destruyen las convenciones, potencian sus talentos √Їnicos y sorprenden incluso al "Rey" James jugando el juego a su manera.

James protagoniza junto al nominado al Oscar Don Cheadle (las pel√≠culas de "Los Vengadores", "Hotel Rwanda"), Khris Davis ("Judas y el Mes√≠as Negro", la serie de televisi√≥n "Atlanta"), Sonequa Martin-Green (la serie de televisi√≥n "The Walking Dead", " Star Trek: Discovery вАЭ), el nuevo talento Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вАЬ Looney Tunes Cartoons вАЭ) y Eric Bauza (вАЬ Looney Tunes Cartoons вАЭ).

Lee (вАЬViaje de ChicasвАЭ, вАЬNight SchoolвАЭ) dirige a partir de un gui√≥n de Juel Taylor, Tony Rettenmaier, Keenan Coogler y Terence Nance. Los productores de la pel√≠cula son Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter y Duncan Henderson, y los productores ejecutivos son Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance e Ivan Reitman.

El equipo creativo detr√°s de escena del director incluye al director de fotograf√≠a Salvatore Totino ("Spider-Man: De Regreso a CasaвАЭ), el productor de animaci√≥n Troy Nethercott (вАЬParque M√°gicoвАЭ), los dise√±adores de producci√≥n Kevin Ishioka (вАЬLa MulaвАЭ), Akin McKenzie ( вАЬAs√≠ nos venвАЭ de Netflix) y Clint Wallace (pr√≥ximamente "Eternals"), el editor Bob Ducsay (вАЬGodzilla II: El Rey de los MonstruosвАЭ, вАЬLa Guerra de las Galaxias, episodio VIII: los √Їltimos JediвАЭ)  y la dise√±adora de vestuario Melissa Bruning  (вАЬRampage: devastaci√≥nвАЭ). La m√Їsica es de Kris Bowers (вАЬGreen Book: una amistad sin fronterasвАЭ y la serie вАЬBridgertonвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures presenta una producci√≥n de Proximity / The SpringHill Company, una pel√≠cula de Malcolm D. Lee, "Space Jam: Una Nueva EraвАЭ. La pel√≠cula ser√° distribuida mundialmente por Warner Bros. Pictures. Pr√≥ximamente - Solo en Cines.

Cuando LeBron y su peque√±o hijo Dom quedan atrapados en un espacio digital por una IA deshonesta, LeBron debe llevarlos a casa a salvo liderando a Bugs, Lola Bunny y toda la pandilla de Looney Tunes notoriamente indisciplinados a la victoria sobre los campeones digitalizados de la IA en el cancha: una lista mejorada de estrellas profesionales del baloncesto como nunca antes las hab√≠as visto. Son Tunes versus Goons en el desaf√≠o m√°s importante de su vida, que redefinir√° el v√≠nculo de LeBron con su hijo y arrojar√° luz sobre el poder de ser uno mismo. Las melod√≠as listas para la acci√≥n destruyen las convenciones, potencian sus talentos √Їnicos y sorprenden incluso al "Rey" James jugando el juego a su manera.

James protagoniza junto al nominado al Oscar Don Cheadle (las pel√≠culas de "Los Vengadores", "Hotel Rwanda"), Khris Davis ("Judas y el Mes√≠as Negro", la serie de televisi√≥n "Atlanta"), Sonequa Martin-Green (la serie de televisi√≥n "The Walking Dead", " Star Trek: Discovery вАЭ), el nuevo talento Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вАЬ Looney Tunes Cartoons вАЭ) y Eric Bauza (вАЬ Looney Tunes Cartoons вАЭ).

Lee (вАЬViaje de ChicasвАЭ, вАЬNight SchoolвАЭ) dirige a partir de un gui√≥n de Juel Taylor, Tony Rettenmaier, Keenan Coogler y Terence Nance. Los productores de la pel√≠cula son Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter y Duncan Henderson, y los productores ejecutivos son Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance e Ivan Reitman.

El equipo creativo detr√°s de escena del director incluye al director de fotograf√≠a Salvatore Totino ("Spider-Man: De Regreso a CasaвАЭ), el productor de animaci√≥n Troy Nethercott (вАЬParque M√°gicoвАЭ), los dise√±adores de producci√≥n Kevin Ishioka (вАЬLa MulaвАЭ), Akin McKenzie ( вАЬAs√≠ nos venвАЭ de Netflix) y Clint Wallace (pr√≥ximamente "Eternals"), el editor Bob Ducsay (вАЬGodzilla II: El Rey de los MonstruosвАЭ, вАЬLa Guerra de las Galaxias, episodio VIII: los √Їltimos JediвАЭ)  y la dise√±adora de vestuario Melissa Bruning  (вАЬRampage: devastaci√≥nвАЭ). La m√Їsica es de Kris Bowers (вАЬGreen Book: una amistad sin fronterasвАЭ y la serie вАЬBridgertonвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures presenta una producci√≥n de Proximity / The SpringHill Company, una pel√≠cula de Malcolm D. Lee, "Space Jam: Una Nueva EraвАЭ. La pel√≠cula ser√° distribuida mundialmente por Warner Bros. Pictures. Pr√≥ximamente - Solo en Cines.

snippet.title: Star Wars: The Bad Batch | Official Trailer | Disney+
snippet.description:
Check out the brand-new trailer for LucasfilmвАЩs вАЬStar Wars: The Bad Batch,вАЭ an original animated series launching exclusively on Disney+. вАЬStar Wars: The Bad BatchвАЭ makes its debut on Tuesday, May 4, with a special 70-minute premiere, followed by new episodes every Friday starting on May 7. 

 

вАЬStar Wars: The Bad BatchвАЭ follows the elite and experimental clones of the Bad Batch (first introduced in вАЬThe Clone WarsвАЭ) as they find their way in a rapidly changing galaxy in the immediate aftermath of the Clone War. Members of Bad BatchвАФa unique squad of clones who vary genetically from their brothers in the Clone ArmyвАФeach possess a singular exceptional skill that makes them extraordinarily effective soldiers and a formidable crew.

 

вАЬStar Wars: The Bad BatchвАЭ is executive produced by Dave Filoni (вАЬThe Mandalorian,вАЭ вАЬStar Wars: The Clone WarsвАЭ), Athena Portillo (вАЬStar Wars: The Clone Wars,вАЭ вАЬStar Wars RebelsвАЭ), Brad Rau (вАЬStar Wars Rebels,вАЭ вАЬStar Wars ResistanceвАЭ) and Jennifer Corbett (вАЬStar Wars Resistance,вАЭ вАЬNCISвАЭ) with Carrie Beck (вАЬThe Mandalorian,вАЭ вАЬStar Wars RebelsвАЭ) as co-executive producer and Josh Rimes as producer (вАЬStar Wars ResistanceвАЭ). Rau is also serving as supervising director with Corbett as head writer.    

 

Visit StarWars.com for more exciting news on the series.

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вАЬYou really find out whoвАЩs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.вАЭ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Llevaba varios d√≠as recorriendo las calles de CaracasвА¶ Ya hab√≠a conocido algunos de los barrios populares que se encuentran al oeste de la ciudadвА¶ viaj√© hasta el otro extremo para conocer las zonas en donde viven los millonariosвА¶ Camin√© por las calles del centro para aprender sobre su historia, para entender la actualidadвА¶ Pero sobre todo para conocer a la gente que cada d√≠a sale a las calles de Caracas con una gran actitud por darlo todo para sacar adelante a su pa√≠sвА¶ De hecho eran tantas mis ganas de explorar este ciudad, que en un momento de sed y antojos durante una noche y tal vez un poco de locuraвА¶ Sal√≠ de mi hotel para recorrer las obscuras y solitarias calles de Caracas en busca de una tienditaвА¶

Y mientras todo esto suced√≠aвА¶ Hab√≠a un personaje muy importante y querido por todos los habitantes de CaracasвА¶ Que observaba atento y en silencio cada movimiento que yo hac√≠aвА¶ Al igual que observa durante d√≠a y noche la vida de todos los habitantes de esta ciudadвА¶ Como si se tratara de un vigilante gigante al cual todos los caraque√±os le tienen mucho cari√±o y respeto.¬†

Se trata de El √БvilaвА¶ Una enorme monta√±a de m√°s de dos mil metros de altura, que sirve como muralla natural entre la ciudad de Caracas y la costa del Caribe.
En esta monta√±a podemos encontrar un parque nacional y en la cima de uno de sus picosвА¶ Un extravagante hotel de lujo, construido en los a√±os 50sвА¶ Pero que estuvo abandonado durante m√°s de 50 a√±osвА¶ Y hoy guarda una de las historias m√°s interesantes de la vida de los Venezolanos.

Para que puedas entender mejor la importancia que tuvo para mi viaje por Venezuela, el haberme podido hospedar en este hotel... Te voy a platicar la primera parte de la historia del hotel Humboldt y m√°s adelante, cuando entremos juntos a conocerlo, podr√°s comprender por qu√© este hotel, se ha vuelto tan enigm√°tico para los venezolanos.

snippet.description:

Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave вАШem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off

But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned

God knows, too long

Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
IвАЩve still got you all over me

With your hands in your pockets
And your вАШdon't you wish you had meвАЩ grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
IвАЩve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
IвАЩve still got you all over me
IвАЩve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me

snippet.description:
Lucas 23:32 - Funky x Alex Zurdo x Redimi2 (Video Oficial) #UNO

Suscr√≠bete a mi canal y activa la campanita: http://bit.ly/FunkyPR

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realredimi2
Twitter: https://twitter.com/realredimi2

Sigue a Alex Zurdo en:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/alexzurdomusic
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexZurdoMusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexzurdomusic/
--------------
Letra:

[Redimi2]
Ah, ah√≠ estas t√Ї el que dec√≠as
Ser el enviado, el supuesto mes√≠as
El que iba a destruir el templo
Y a reconstruirlo en tres dias

Fantas√≠as y sensacionalismo
Tus seguidores llenos de fanatismo
Si en verdad eres quien dices ser
S√°lvanos y s√°lvate a ti mismo

Si resucitaste muertos con tu palabra
Si en verdad sanaste tanta gente
Como es posible que no puedas liberarte
Si aqu√≠ estamos consciente de que eres inocente

Aunque pens√°ndolo bien eres culpable
Tu poder se hizo dudable
Demu√©strame que me equivoco
O s√°lvanos que esta agon√≠a es insoportable

[Alex Zurdo]
Yo detendr√≠a todo esto porque puedo
Pero es necesario esta situaci√≥n
Y no has entendido que si aqu√≠ me quedo
Llegar√° la verdadera salvaci√≥n

Quieren que me libre de la muerte
Pa que siga con la vida
Pero yo dar√© la vida
Y ser√°n libres con mi muerte

Que si de verdad soy fuerte
Que me baje enseguida
Pero yo soy la verdad
Que enseguida te hace fuerte

Y aunque no entiendas y razones mal
Todo es parte de un plan inmenso
Que empez√≥ por la parte final
Y termin√≥ elaborando el comienzo

//Solo el amor, soporta el dolor
Perdona tu error y te da favor//

[Funky]
Hey, ser√° que no temes a Dios
Este hombre no merece estar aqu√≠ con nosotros dos
No, no seas indiferente
Que a √©l lo han condenado injustamente

√Йl no ten√≠a que atravesar este tormento
Sus verdugos sentir√°n el remordimiento
Presiento que este hombre es el hijo del Dios viviente
Creo que se est√° derramando sangre inocente

Jes√Їs yo no voy a reclamarte nada
Tu no me debes nada, yo no nada merezco
Ha sido un honor tenerte cerca aunque sea
En este momento en el que perezco

[Redimi2]
Ja, no me digas que le crees
√Йl no es lo que dijo ser
¬њNo lo ves? Solo es un rey de prostitutas y ladrones
Uno de m√°s de entre tantas religiones

[Funky]
Pues yo creo que es prop√≥sito divino
Que √©l est√© en esa cruz es parte de su destino
Se√±or yo si te creo y creo que eres la vida
Que eres la verdad y que eres el camino

No me tienes que contestar
Solo una cosa te voy a rogar
No me vayas a olvidar
Y acu√©rdate de m√≠ cuando comiences a reinar

[Alex Zurdo]
Ni la vida, ni la muerte
Ni el presente o porvenir
Nada te separar√° de mi

Ni la vida, ni la muerte
Ni el lugar en donde estoy
//Nada impedir√° que est√©s en el para√≠so//

// (Te aseguro desde hoy
Ir√°s conmigo a donde voy) //

#Lucas2332 #UNO #AlexZurdo #Funky #Redimi2

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вАЬI crossed a line IвАЩd never crossed in addiction.вАЭ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi LovatoвАЩs new album вАШDancing With The DevilвА¶ The Art Of Starting OverвАЩ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

en.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:

UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
